overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, digital billboards, and futuristic architecture. The player character crosses streets, explores plazas, and approaches a hotel building while heavy rain creates reflective wet surfaces throughout the urban environment.

segments.scene_description: Standing at a rain-soaked urban crosswalk at night, waiting for traffic to clear. A white van passes by as the pedestrian signal changes to green, and the character begins crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward a modern glass building across the street.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza illuminated by massive digital billboards casting purple and pink reflections on the wet tiled ground. The character walks past a glass-walled building with visible interior plants while approaching a covered walkway structure with overhead lighting.

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a covered plaza structure with overhead beams illuminated by shifting blue and cyan neon lights. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers disappearing into the rainy darkness above, while passing a parked black SUV and large medical advertisements on the walls.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a tall building with a prominent purple neon HOTEL sign on its facade. The character walks across the open plaza with other pedestrians, passing ground-level shops with glowing windows while the massive skyscraper towers loom in the background against the rainy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked urban intersection into the heart of a neon-drenched pedestrian plaza. It begins at a wide yellow-striped crosswalk, waiting for a white van to pass before moving across the street toward a modern glass building. As the camera enters a wide plaza, the environment opens up into a space dominated by massive digital billboards that cast vibrant purple and pink reflections across the wet tiled ground. The scene then shifts beneath a covered walkway where shifting blue and cyan neon lights illuminate overhead beams, momentarily tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers disappearing into the rainy darkness. Finally, the camera glides past glowing shop windows and other pedestrians, approaching a tall building marked by a prominent purple neon hotel sign that looms against the night sky.
